title: f3 time display
description: display time on your f3 debug screen
body:
# Display time on your f3 debug screen ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d19b75eba2ec2cd030c813e6c3cab510514e4a14.png) you can toggle it via f3 + f6 ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16a5037a80268a6f3e7677ee6d1aac545cf26163.png) you can change time format in .minecraft/config/timedisplay-format.json
![default settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a0adffcfc06ef5eaae2d85f5e3eb89395ea1a31.png)
